bugs.description: Pharmacy dashboard crashed with NameError: MODULES and PHARMACY_TRACK_ID were referenced but not imported/defined. All /pharmacy routes returned HTTP 500.
bugs.fix: Import MODULES from progress_service; filter module_catalog by track == 'pharmacy'.

bugs.description: reportProgress() called refreshProgressBar() which was never defined, causing ReferenceError after safety drill completion and blocking progress UI updates.
bugs.fix: Added refreshProgressBar() that fetches /api/mental-health/stats and updates the progress bar DOM.

bugs.description: API stats fallback hardcoded items_total=46 while MODULES catalog was updated to 47, causing stale progress totals for new DB rows.
bugs.fix: Use MODULES[MODULE_ID]['total'] fallback; added ITEMS_TOTAL=47 to microbiology_service.

bugs.description: API stats fallback hardcoded items_total=53 instead of reading MODULES catalog, risking drift if totals change.
bugs.fix: Use MODULES[MODULE_ID]['total'] as the stats fallback.

bugs.description: random.sample() in practice/drill/scenario endpoints raised ValueError when content pools were empty (scaffold builds or count=0 edge cases).
bugs.fix: Added safe_sample() in content_loader.py; migrated assessment, maternal_child, mental_health, microbiology, pathophysiology, and terminology services.

bugs.description: Practice and drill completion screens computed score % as correct/total without guarding empty question arrays, yielding NaN% in UI when API returned zero items.
bugs.fix: Added length checks before division (consistent with mental_health.js and pathophysiology.js patterns).

bugs.description: ModuleProgressReport Pydantic model duplicated identically across every module router, creating drift risk for progress API contracts.
bugs.fix: Centralized ModuleProgressReport in app/models.py; all routers import the shared schema.

bugs.description: Stats endpoints used per-service ITEMS_TOTAL constants instead of MODULES catalog, inconsistent with dosage/microbiology pattern.
bugs.fix: Standardized items_total fallback to MODULES[module_id]['total'] across all module stats routes.

bugs.description: Duplicate check_maternal_child() function and double invocation in main() caused redundant test output and import clutter.
bugs.fix: Merged into single comprehensive maternal-child check; added safe_sample edge-case tests and 6 additional FastAPI smoke routes.

verified_ok: python test_startup.py — DB, terminology, dosage, pathophysiology, assessment, maternal-child, mental health, microbiology, pharmacy, safe_sample, socratic registry, 18 FastAPI routes
python test_socratic.py — registry, chat flow, topic detection
Tab navigation: WardTabs.register/init on all 9 module JS files; goToModuleTab() in ward.js
MODULES totals aligned: terminology=220, microbiology=47, dosage=53, assessment=132, mental_health=29, pathophysiology=76, maternal_child=115, pharmacy_calculations=48

remaining_risks.risk: Pharmacy calculations module is scaffold-only (0 live practice problems in JSON); progress reflects catalog total, not interactive drills.
remaining_risks.mitigation: Tracked in pharmacy manifest build phases.

remaining_risks.risk: Dosage module has 13 practice problems but MODULES total is 53 (calc types, drug classes, safety cards). Progress % reflects catalog total — by design but may confuse users.
remaining_risks.mitigation: Document progress semantics on module UI.

remaining_risks.risk: Socratic AI tutor depends on external provider configuration; placeholder mode verified but live Ollama/API not covered by startup tests.
remaining_risks.mitigation: Manual smoke test with configured API key before production demo.

test_results.test_startup_py: PASS — extended with safe_sample, maternal-child manifest/drill, pharmacy manifest, export routes (18 routes)
